context: Tests whether the ActivityKit skill guidance is applied for scheduled push review.

checklist.name: Scheduled overload
checklist.description: Corrects the scheduled start API to the iOS 26+ request overload that includes style, alertConfiguration, and start or startDate.

checklist.name: Style availability
checklist.description: States that the Activity.request style parameter is iOS 18+ rather than iOS 26-only.

checklist.name: Standard style
checklist.description: Recommends standard style for a persistent flight-board activity rather than transient.

checklist.name: Transient semantics
checklist.description: Describes transient as an extended Dynamic Island presentation that can auto-end on lock, collapse, leaving the app, or similar exits.

checklist.name: Push start alert
checklist.description: States that push-to-start payloads require alert.

checklist.name: Payload fields
checklist.description: Lists push-to-start fields including event start, attributes-type, attributes, content-state, and alert.

checklist.name: Frequent key
checklist.description: Uses NSSupportsLiveActivitiesFrequentUpdates for frequent Live Activity pushes.

checklist.name: Frequent permission
checklist.description: Mentions frequentPushesEnabled or frequentPushEnablementUpdates for user/system frequent push enablement.

checklist.name: No fixed cadence
checklist.description: Does not promise a fixed 30-second or once-per-minute update rate.

checklist.name: Duration distinction
checklist.description: Distinguishes 8-hour active limit, 12-hour system-ended Lock Screen persistence total, and app-ended default dismissal up to 4 hours.
